title: Create a continuous planning control packet
persona: S&OP planner with orders or operations edit access
steps: Open the AMP35 Plan control workspace.
Review demand variance, supply coverage, inventory coverage, transport risk, replanning triggers, recovery actions, owner work, approval plan, and rollback plan.
expected: A persisted AssistantContinuousPlanningPacket is created with controlSnapshotJson, varianceJson, triggerJson, recoveryPlanJson, ownerWorkJson, approvalPlanJson, rollbackPlanJson, and leadershipSummary.
The packet shows plan health, breached triggers, recovery owner work, and an approval-safe recommendation.
No forecast, sales order, PO, inventory, WMS task, shipment, supplier commitment, or customer promise is mutated automatically.

title: Queue replanning review
persona: Operations controller with planning review authority
steps: Create or select a DRAFT continuous planning packet.
Add a review note describing the intended recovery or monitor decision.
expected: The packet status changes to REVIEW_QUEUED with actionQueueItemId, approvedByUserId, approvedAt, and approvalNote.
An AssistantActionQueueItem is created with actionKind assistant_continuous_planning_review and objectHref /assistant/continuous-planning.
An AssistantAuditEvent states that forecasts, orders, POs, inventory, WMS tasks, shipments, suppliers, and customer promises were not changed automatically.

title: Monitor mode when plan variances are within thresholds
steps: Open AMP35 when demand, supply, inventory, transport, and supplier signals are within thresholds.
Inspect the recovery and rollback sections.
expected: triggerJson contains zero breached replanning triggers.
recoveryPlanJson recommends monitor mode rather than downstream execution.
rollbackPlanJson still preserves current operational records and instructs users to create a fresh packet when actuals materially change.
